category_sources: source_facts.description says it discovers advertised Onion-Location for URLs; PyPI project description says it is a Python library for discovering Onion-Location HTTP headers at https://pypi.org/project/onion-location/.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is onion-location and source_facts.homepage points to the official project URL https://codeberg.org/Freso/python-onion-location.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Codeberg project; PyPI project page includes official usage documentation for get_onion_location at https://pypi.org/project/onion-location/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is an official Codeberg source-control project URL for Freso/python-onion-location.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and PyPI metadata at https://pypi.org/project/onion-location/ identify Onion-Location, Tor, Python, and command-line/library usage.
